releaseNotes: v0.25.3 — Liberty CSV adapter. Resolves the Cross-Thread Ask from CSU pharmacy onboarding: Liberty Software's 'Lot/Exp' report uses an alternating Lot/Data row pattern (NOT flat CSV) with multi-lot quirks and fractional quantities. v0.25.3 detects the format, reshapes to flat, preserves multi-lot rows verbatim for DSCSA traceability, rounds fractional qty to nearest int (no more silent fallback to 1). Month-name date parsing extended ('May 12, 2026') for Liberty's header + other legacy reports. RxRescue pitch to Liberty-using pharmacies is now no-third-scan + audit-ready off their existing report. 414 tests passing.
